column1: "Date": Represents the date of the transaction.
"Description": Represents the description for the goods or services from your vendor or financial institution.
"Amount": Represents the total cost of the transaction in USD.
"Account Name": Represents which account was used for the transaction.
"Category": Represents the general nature of the expense or income.
"Subcategory": Represents a more specific classification within a category and provides details about the nature of a transaction.
"Expense": Represents a transaction where money is spent. If there is a refund, it will appear as a positive amount to balance out the original expense.
"Income": Represents money added to your account.
"Transfer": Represents transactions that move money between accounts.
"Saving": Represents money transferred manually or automatically into savings.
